title: kyllinga odorata subsp. appendiculata
intro: Kyllinga odorata subsp. appendiculata, also known as the lesser water chestnut, is a type of aquatic plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Kyllinga odorata subsp. appendiculata include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and rhizomes are used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and poultices.
